reconciled_inventory.p3_black_pot: Contains White Rabbit anchor; plant material absent
reconciled_inventory.p4_black_pot: Not visually distinct from p2/p3 cluster

new_introductions: External object (cylindrical container) observed in T-2

plant_audit.p1_string_of_nickels: No biological material detected. Soil appears undisturbed.
plant_audit.p2_mexican_mint: No biological material detected. Pot appears empty.
plant_audit.p3_pothos: No foliage detected. Only the white rabbit anchor remains.

biome_observations.soil_condition: Dark, potentially moist, but devoid of any vegetative growth.
biome_observations.surface_debris: Presence of non-botanical artifacts (spoon, cylinder) suggests the desk is being used for storage or staging rather than active cultivation.

temporal_deltas.earliest_to_t4: Initial state shows empty pots. No growth observed.
temporal_deltas.t4_to_t3: Introduction of a metal spoon into the biome space.
temporal_deltas.t3_to_t2: Removal of spoon; introduction of a white cylindrical object.
temporal_deltas.t2_to_current: Removal of cylindrical object; return to static, empty state.

vision_report.visual_health_inference: The biome is currently in a state of total biological failure. There are no living specimens present in any of the registered pots. The environment is effectively a 'dead' zone.
anomalies: Presence of non-botanical household items (spoon, cylinder) in the immediate vicinity of the pots.
Lighting is insufficient for photosynthesis, which may have contributed to the systemic loss.
vision_report.narrative_description: The audit reveals a complete absence of the expected botanical specimens. The pots are present but contain only soil. The sequence of images documents the movement of non-botanical objects (a spoon and a cylinder) in and out of the frame, but no plant life is visible at any point. The biome is currently non-functional.
